description:
Implement `hx-ripple` (T4 Infrastructure) ŌĆö optional touch/click ripple effect utility for interactive elements. Used by hx-button and other components when the active theme calls for tactile feedback.

**Files to create** in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-ripple/`:
- `index.ts`, `hx-ripple.ts`, `hx-ripple.styles.ts`, `hx-ripple.stories.ts`, `hx-ripple.test.ts`

**Props:** `color` (string ŌĆö ripple color, defaults to `--hx-ripple-color` or `currentColor`), `disabled` (boolean)

**Slots:** default (the element to apply ripple to)

**CSS Parts:** `base`, `ripple` (the expanding circle)

**Implementation:** On `pointerdown`, create a circle element at the click position, animate it expanding and fading with CSS keyframes, then remove it. The ripple container uses `overflow: hidden` and `position: relative`. Respects `prefers-reduced-motion: reduce` (disabled when set).

**ARIA:** `aria-hidden="true"` on all ripple elements ŌĆö purely decorative.

**Note:** This is priority 4 (lowest) as it's optional visual polish. Can be deferred if implementation time is limited. The system works without it.

**Quality gates:** type-check zero errors, tests (ripple created on click, reduced-motion disables it), axe-core zero violations (ripples hidden from AT), Storybook with button demo, bundle < 2KB.

Register in `packages/hx-library/src/index.ts` and `packages/hx-library/vite.config.ts`.
title: IMPLEMENT: hx-ripple ŌĆö T4 Material Ripple Effect Utility
